message:
🐛 fix(kube-chess): address Copilot follow-ups on threefold-repetition (#7894) (#7896)

Five Copilot findings on merged PR #7891:

1. **Perf regression in AI search.** `makeMove` now takes `trackHistory`
   (default `false`). Only the three UI-commit call sites (user move,
   promotion, AI-commit) pass `true` to extend `positionHistory`. Search
   paths (`getAllLegalMoves`, `minimax`, hover validation) get the parent
   reference unchanged — no per-simulated-move spread.

2. **En-passant in the repetition key.** Per FIDE, EP only counts when
   the side-to-move actually has a pawn that can legally capture on the
   target square. `positionKey` now checks the two diagonally-back squares
   for a same-color pawn and drops the EP component when none exists.

3. **Minimax didn't recognize repetition.** `result === 'repetition'`
   now returns `0` (draw) alongside `'stalemate'` so the AI stops
   evaluating sub-trees that terminate in a draw-by-repetition.

4. **Game-over overlay said "Stalemate!" for repetition.** The modal
   now shows "Draw by threefold repetition!" and uses the neutral
   yellow crown for both draws (stalemate + repetition).

5. **Older saves never counted the loaded position once.** The
   `useState` initializer migrates any saved state with missing or
   empty `positionHistory` by seeding it with the current position's
   key — so the loaded position counts as occurrence 1, and threefold
   triggers at 3 (not 4) total occurrences.

Fixes #7894

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
